overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a dark concrete underpass with neon billboards, emerging into a bright sunlit street with towering holographic advertisements, and ending in a covered walkway with red neon lighting. The clip showcases dense urban architecture, futuristic vehicles, and pedestrian NPCs.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered concrete underpass toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: rough concrete wall with large illuminated billboards mounted on it
large vertical billboard with neon blue lighting displaying a face and text
massive concrete overpass structure forming the ceiling of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a dark, enclosed concrete underpass. The walls feature glowing neon billboards with cyberpunk aesthetics, and the path leads toward a bright exit visible in the distance. The environment is devoid of pedestrians and vehicles, creating a quiet, anticipatory atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits the dark underpass into bright sunlight, revealing a sprawling futuristic cityscape
futuristic vehicles drive past on the multi-lane street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the wide sidewalk of a bustling futuristic street, passing pedestrians and observing the towering buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
futuristic sedan driving along the street, passing by the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall industrial building with white steam vents emitting smoke near the roof
massive rotating holographic advertisement displaying food items on a tall pillar
large ornate golden sculpture attached to building facade resembling a totem
tall palm tree growing from the sidewalk near the building edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into brilliant sunlight, the scene opens into a wide futuristic city street. Towering buildings with massive holographic billboards dominate the skyline, while steam vents release white clouds from an industrial structure ahead. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalk and futuristic vehicles cruise along the road, creating a lively urban atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded downtown street with commercial storefronts

events.description: slight turn to navigate around pedestrians while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: continuing down the city sidewalk, maneuvering through moderate pedestrian traffic and passing various storefronts

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and shorts walking ahead on the sidewalk
silver sports car driving past on the street

entered.detail: dark building front with multiple signs including 'KUTSURAGI CAFE' and neon green 'OPEN' sign
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
tall orange traffic poles with horizontal lights extending over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along a shaded city street lined with commercial buildings and cafes. The sidewalk becomes more crowded with pedestrians walking in various directions, while futuristic cars pass by on the adjacent road. Overhead walkways and traffic infrastructure create a dense, layered urban environment typical of a cyberpunk metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with red neon security checkpoint

events.description: enters a covered metal walkway with scaffolding and red neon lighting
environment shifts to dark tones illuminated by vertical red neon light pillars

agents.ego_description: walking through a security checkpoint area with red neon lighting, following other pedestrians through the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket walking ahead through the metal detector gates

entered.detail: industrial metal framework forming a covered tunnel over the walkway
vertical light strips emitting bright red neon illumination along the walkway sides
checkpoint barriers with glowing red lights and metal detector frames
vertical digital displays showing advertisements on the walkway walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway with industrial metal scaffolding overhead. The environment is dramatically lit by vertical red neon pillars creating a security checkpoint atmosphere. The path narrows as it passes through metal detector gates, with other pedestrians ahead, before opening up toward the distant city street visible at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded, dark underpass into the vibrant chaos of a futuristic metropolis, eventually narrowing into a sterile security corridor. It begins within an enclosed concrete tunnel lined with glowing neon billboards, moving steadily toward a bright light at the exit. As the camera emerges into brilliant sunlight, the scene opens into a wide city street dominated by towering holographic advertisements, steam vents, and a flow of futuristic vehicles and pedestrians. The walk then continues along a shaded commercial district filled with cafes and layered overhead infrastructure before shifting into a covered pedestrian walkway. Finally, the environment transitions into a narrow passage defined by industrial scaffolding and vertical red neon pillars, passing through metal detector gates toward the distant city skyline.
